targets.query:
from(bucket: "aircraft-states")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aircraft_states_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "latitude" or r._field == "longitude" or r._field == "alt_baro")
  |> group(columns: ["hex", "aircraft_type", "_field"])
  |> last()
  |> group(columns: ["hex"])
  |> pivot(rowKey: ["hex"], columnKey: ["_field"], valueColumn: "_value")
  |> group()

from(bucket: "aircraft-states")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aircraft_states_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "latitude")
  |> group(columns: ["aircraft_type"])
  |> count()
  |> rename(columns: {_value: "count"})
  |> sort(columns: ["count"], desc: true)
  |> limit(n: 15)

from(bucket: "aircraft-states")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aircraft_states_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "latitude")
  |> group(columns: ["_time"])
  |> count(column: "_value")
  |> group()
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 10s, fn: sum, createEmpty: false)
  |> map(fn: (r) => ({ r with _field: "aircraft_count" }))

panels.title: Average Ground Speed by Aircraft Type

targets.query:
from(bucket: "aircraft-states")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aircraft_states_agg")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "avg_ground_speed")
  |> group(columns: ["aircraft_type"])

panels.title: Average Baro Altitude by Aircraft Type

targets.query:
from(bucket: "aircraft-states")
  |> range(start: -15m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aircraft_states_agg")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "avg_alt_baro")
  |> group(columns: ["aircraft_type"])

from(bucket: "aircraft-states")
  |> range(start: -2m)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "aircraft_states_raw")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "latitude")
  |> group(columns: ["on_ground"])
  |> count()
